findings.observed: browser-e2e builds the production frontend without VITE_API_URL, calls the Railway fallback, and never reaches the CI backend or mock runtime.
findings.expected: browser-e2e builds with VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001 and completes the deterministic desktop and tablet import paths.

findings.observed: Attempt 5 reconstructed C:/tmp/ClinicOS-agent-team/agent-team/.worktrees/issue-263 even though that directory does not exist. runProcess then reported spawn claude ENOENT. The claim was released but the issue remained agent-working with no active claim, and agent-team:once still returned process exit code 0 with development.errors populated.
findings.expected: Recovery validates that the recorded worktree exists and belongs to the expected branch; otherwise it safely reuses or recreates valid coordinates. Worker failure returns the issue to a claimable development state and the command reports the failure unambiguously. Claude must then be invoked in the valid worktree.
findings.reproduction_command_ref: npm run agent-team:once; npm run agent-team:status; git worktree list --porcelain
